name: Engagement Personalization with OTT Platform
description: Engagement Personalization with OTT Platform classifies audience segments and personalizes social signals; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via OTT Platform to boost engagement.

steps.name: Asset Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize social signals from CMS; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: Reason
steps.description: Execute reason phase for the Chain-of-Thought pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Decide
steps.description: Execute decide phase for the Chain-of-Thought pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Creative Selection
steps.description: Creative Selection across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Recommendation
steps.description: Recommendation across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Schedule Optimization
steps.description: Schedule Optimization across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Audience Targeting
steps.description: Audience Targeting across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Rights Validation
steps.description: Rights Validation across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Content Classification
steps.description: Content Classification across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Delivery Package
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to Transcoder; return response JSON for the client.
